frontmatter.description: Caller is being throttled by an upstream rate limit (HTTP 429)

signature.embedding_seed: rate limit 429 throttle quota exceeded too many requests

body:
## When this fires
The upstream is returning 429 because we exceeded our per-key, per-IP, or global quota. Common triggers: a new feature shipped that loops without backoff, a retry storm after an unrelated outage, or a quota tier change at the provider.

## Playbook
1. Check request-rate-by-key to see if a single caller dominates.
2. Compare against upstream-quota for the configured budget.
3. Read recent-deploys-svc for new code paths that increased call volume.
